declarations.description: Root ordered transcript container for message-first AI conversations.
declarations.name: AiConversation

cssProperties.description: Vertical gap between direct child records. Default: var(--ai-space-lg)
cssProperties.name: --ai-conversation-gap

cssProperties.description: Optional visual marker for live conversations. Default: transparent
cssProperties.name: --ai-conversation-live-border-color

slots.description: Ordered records: ai-message, ai-tool-call, ai-tool-result, ai-thinking, ai-event, or native elements.

members.name: density
members.description: Spacing density for transcript rows. Invalid values fall back to comfortable.

members.name: live
members.description: Whether this is a live/streaming region. Adds aria-live="polite" by default.

members.name: label
members.description: Accessible label for the conversation region.

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: Spacing density for transcript rows. Invalid values fall back to comfortable.

attributes.name: live
attributes.description: Whether this is a live/streaming region. Adds aria-live="polite" by default.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the conversation region.

declarations.description:
Non-message, non-operation transcript event.

Represents status changes, model switches, checkpoints, notes,
system messages, errors, or custom events within an AI transcript.
declarations.name: AiEvent

cssProperties.description: Meta slot text color. Default: var(--ai-color-text-muted)
cssProperties.name: --ai-event-meta-color

members.name: htmlFor
members.description: ID of the element this event pertains to (maps to `for` attribute).

members.name: open
members.description: Whether the event details are expanded.

members.name: toggle
members.description: Toggle open state. Optionally force open/closed.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: ID of the element this event pertains to (maps to `for` attribute).

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the event details are expanded.

declarations.description: Message-first transcript record with role-specific pi-ui presentation.
declarations.name: AiMessage

cssProperties.description: Optional message border color. Default: transparent
cssProperties.name: --ai-message-border-color

cssProperties.description: Gap between slotted content blocks. Default: var(--spacing-xs)
cssProperties.name: --ai-message-gap

cssProperties.description: User bubble max width. Default: min(90%, 640px)
cssProperties.name: --ai-message-user-max-width

slots.description: Content blocks, usually ai-markdown, ai-thinking, ai-tool-call, ai-tool-result, or ai-event.
Timestamp, model, or other metadata. Prefer native <time>.
slots.name: meta

members.name: role
members.description: Message author/source role. Unknown values render as system-style rows.

members.name: htmlFor
members.description: Optional associated record id; maps to native `for` attribute.

members.name: timestamp
members.description: ISO-ish timestamp for metadata/association; visual formatting is left to slotted meta.

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: Message author/source role. Unknown values render as system-style rows.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: Optional associated record id; maps to native `for` attribute.

attributes.name: timestamp
attributes.description: ISO-ish timestamp for metadata/association; visual formatting is left to slotted meta.

declarations.description: Specialized assistant content block for model reasoning.
declarations.name: AiThinking

slots.description: Thinking content if content property is not set.

members.name: content
members.description: Thinking text to render. Prefer property binding for streaming content.

members.name: redacted
members.description: Thinking exists but is not available.

members.name: headline
members.description: Optional summary headline. Defaults to a first-sentence summary of content.

events.name: ai-show
events.description: Emitted when disclosure opens. Bubbles, composed.

events.name: ai-hide
events.description: Emitted when disclosure closes. Bubbles, composed.

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Thinking text to render. Prefer property binding for streaming content.

attributes.name: redacted
attributes.description: Thinking exists but is not available.

attributes.name: headline
attributes.description: Optional summary headline. Defaults to a first-sentence summary of content.

declarations.description: Specialized assistant content block for a tool call.
declarations.name: AiToolCall

events.description: Emitted when disclosure opens. Bubbles, composed.
events.name: ai-show

events.description: Emitted when disclosure closes. Bubbles, composed.
events.name: ai-hide

slots.description: Output content. If absent and content is set, renders normalized output in <pre>.

members.name: htmlFor
members.description: Associated ai-tool-call[id]. Missing/mismatched ids are allowed.

members.name: content
members.description: Raw output content. Prefer property binding for large content.

members.name: truncated
members.description: Whether the rendered output was truncated upstream.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: Associated ai-tool-call[id]. Missing/mismatched ids are allowed.

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Raw output content. Prefer property binding for large content.

attributes.name: truncated
attributes.description: Whether the rendered output was truncated upstream.

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: "Semantic/AiConversation", component: "ai-conversation", tags: ["autodocs"], }

declarations.name: SimpleConversation
declarations.default:
{ render: () => html` 6:30 PM 
src/config.ts
 6:30 PM `, }

declarations.name: Playground
declarations.default: { args: { density: "comfortable", live: false, }, render: (args) => html` <ai-conversation density=${args.density ?? "comfortable"} ?live=${args.live ?? false} > <ai-message role="user"> <ai-markdown tone="user" content="Hello, how are you?"></ai-markdown> </ai-message> <ai-message role="assistant"> <ai-markdown content="I'm doing well! How can I help?"></ai-markdown> </ai-message> </ai-conversation> `, }

declarations.name: Compact
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-conversation density="compact"> <ai-message role="user"><ai-markdown tone="user" content="Hello"></ai-markdown></ai-message> <ai-message role="assistant"><ai-markdown content="Hi there!"></ai-markdown></ai-message> <ai-message role="user"><ai-markdown tone="user" content="Thanks"></ai-markdown></ai-message> </ai-conversation> `, }

declarations.name: Live
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-conversation live> <ai-message role="assistant" status="running"> <ai-thinking .content=${"I need to inspect the latest logs before answering."} open></ai-thinking> <ai-tool-call id="bash-1" name="bash" headline="tail -20 server.log" status="running" open></ai-tool-call> </ai-message> </ai-conversation> `, }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: "Semantic/AiEvent", component: "ai-event", tags: ["autodocs"], }

declarations.name: Playground
declarations.default: { args: { kind: "status", severity: "info", source: "", open: true, }, render: (args) => html` <ai-event kind=${args.kind ?? "custom"} severity=${args.severity ?? "info"} source=${args.source ?? ""} ?open=${args.open ?? false} > Session restored from checkpoint. </ai-event> `, }

declarations.name: ModelChange
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-event kind="model-change" severity="info"> Switched to claude-sonnet-4 </ai-event> `, }

declarations.name: ErrorEvent
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-event kind="error" severity="error" open> Connection lost. Reconnecting... </ai-event> `, }

declarations.name: Warning
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-event kind="note" severity="warning" open> Approaching token limit. </ai-event> `, }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: "Semantic/AiMessage", component: "ai-message", tags: ["autodocs"], }

declarations.name: UserMessage
declarations.default: { args: { role: "user", timestamp: "2026-06-03T18:30:00.000Z", }, render: (args) => html` <ai-message role=${args.role ?? "assistant"} timestamp=${args.timestamp ?? ""}> <ai-markdown tone="user" content="Can you inspect the project and run tests?"></ai-markdown> <time slot="meta" datetime=${args.timestamp ?? ""}>6:30 PM</time> </ai-message> `, }

declarations.name: AssistantMessage
declarations.default: { args: { role: "assistant", timestamp: "2026-06-03T18:30:04.000Z", }, render: (args) => html` <ai-message role=${args.role ?? "assistant"} timestamp=${args.timestamp ?? ""}> <ai-markdown content="I'll inspect the repository, then run the focused checks."></ai-markdown> <time slot="meta" datetime=${args.timestamp ?? ""}>6:30 PM</time> </ai-message> `, }

declarations.name: ToolMessage
declarations.default: { args: { role: "tool", for: "read-1", timestamp: "2026-06-03T18:30:06.000Z", }, render: (args) => html` <ai-message role=${args.role ?? "tool"} for=${args.for ?? ""} timestamp=${args.timestamp ?? ""}> <ai-tool-result for=${args.for ?? ""} name="read" status="success" content="export const config = { port: 3000 };"></ai-tool-result> <time slot="meta" datetime=${args.timestamp ?? ""}>6:30 PM</time> </ai-message> `, }

declarations.name: RunningAssistant
declarations.default: { args: { role: "assistant", status: "running", }, render: (args) => html` <ai-message role=${args.role ?? "assistant"} status=${args.status ?? "unknown"}> <ai-tool-call id="bash-1" name="bash" headline="bun test" status="running" open> <ai-tool-result for="bash-1" name="bash" status="unknown" content="Running..."></ai-tool-result> </ai-tool-call> </ai-message> `, }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: "Semantic/AiThinking", component: "ai-thinking", tags: ["autodocs"], }

declarations.name: Closed
declarations.default: { args: { source: "model", open: false, redacted: false, }, render: (args) => frame(html` <ai-thinking source=${args.source ?? "unknown"} ?open=${args.open ?? false} ?redacted=${args.redacted ?? false} .content=${thinkingText} ></ai-thinking> `), }

declarations.name: Open
declarations.default: { args: { source: "model", open: true, redacted: false, }, render: (args) => frame(html` <ai-thinking source=${args.source ?? "unknown"} ?open=${args.open ?? false} ?redacted=${args.redacted ?? false} .content=${thinkingText} ></ai-thinking> `), }

declarations.name: Redacted
declarations.default: { args: { source: "model", redacted: true, }, render: (args) => frame(html` <ai-thinking source=${args.source ?? "unknown"} ?redacted=${args.redacted ?? false} ></ai-thinking> `), }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: "Semantic/AiToolCall", component: "ai-tool-call", tags: ["autodocs"], }

declarations.default:
{ render: () => html` 
bun test src/
 `, }

declarations.default:

{ args: { direction: "column", gap: "md", align: "stretch", justify: "start", wrap: false, inline: false, }, render: (args) => html`
Row 1
Row 2
Row 3
 `, }

declarations.name: StackRow
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-stack direction="row" gap="sm" align="center"> <ai-badge tone="success">pass</ai-badge> <ai-text size="meta">42 tests</ai-text> </ai-stack> `, }

declarations.name: SurfacePlayground
declarations.default:
{ args: { variant: "outlined", tone: "neutral", radius: "md", interactive: false, }, render: (args) => html`
Surface content
 `, }

declarations.name: SurfaceMeta
declarations.default: surfaceMeta

declarations.name: TextPlayground
declarations.default: { args: { size: "body", weight: "normal", tone: "default", mono: false, truncate: false, inline: false, }, render: (args) => html` <ai-text size=${args.size ?? "body"} weight=${args.weight ?? "normal"} tone=${args.tone ?? "default"} ?mono=${args.mono ?? false} ?truncate=${args.truncate ?? false} ?inline=${args.inline ?? false} > The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. </ai-text> `, }

declarations.name: TextSizes
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-stack gap="xs"> <ai-text size="caption">Caption — 0.75rem</ai-text> <ai-text size="meta">Meta — 0.8125rem</ai-text> <ai-text size="ui">UI — 0.875rem</ai-text> <ai-text size="body">Body — 1rem</ai-text> <ai-text size="title" weight="bold">Title — 1.125rem</ai-text> <ai-text size="display" weight="bold">Display — 1.375rem</ai-text> </ai-stack> `, }

declarations.name: TextTones
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-stack gap="xs"> <ai-text tone="default">Default</ai-text> <ai-text tone="muted">Muted</ai-text> <ai-text tone="accent">Accent</ai-text> <ai-text tone="success">Success</ai-text> <ai-text tone="warning">Warning</ai-text> <ai-text tone="error">Error</ai-text> </ai-stack> `, }

declarations.name: TextMeta
declarations.default: textMeta

declarations.name: MarkdownPlayground
declarations.default:
{ args: { content: "## Heading

This is **markdown** with `inline code` and [links](https://example.com).

- List item one
- List item two

```
const x = 42;
```", tone: "assistant", trusted: false, }, render: (args) => html` <ai-markdown .content=${args.content ?? ""} tone=${args.tone ?? "assistant"} ?trusted=${args.trusted ?? false} ></ai-markdown> `, }

declarations.name: MarkdownMeta
declarations.default: markdownMeta

declarations.name: BadgePlayground
declarations.default: { args: { tone: "neutral", size: "md", dot: false, }, render: (args) => html` <ai-badge tone=${args.tone ?? "neutral"} size=${args.size ?? "md"} ?dot=${args.dot ?? false} > label </ai-badge> `, }

declarations.name: BadgesAll
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-stack direction="row" gap="sm" align="center"> <ai-badge>neutral</ai-badge> <ai-badge tone="accent">accent</ai-badge> <ai-badge tone="success">success</ai-badge> <ai-badge tone="warning">warning</ai-badge> <ai-badge tone="error">error</ai-badge> <ai-badge tone="info">info</ai-badge> </ai-stack> `, }

declarations.name: BadgeMeta
declarations.default: badgeMeta

declarations.name: StatusPlayground
declarations.default: { args: { state: "success", size: "md", variant: "dot", }, render: (args) => html` <ai-status state=${args.state ?? "unknown"} size=${args.size ?? "md"} variant=${args.variant ?? "dot"} ></ai-status> `, }

declarations.name: StatusAll
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-stack direction="row" gap="lg" align="center"> <ai-status state="idle"></ai-status> <ai-status state="running"></ai-status> <ai-status state="success"></ai-status> <ai-status state="error"></ai-status> <ai-status state="cancelled"></ai-status> <ai-status state="unknown"></ai-status> </ai-stack> `, }

declarations.name: StatusMeta
declarations.default: statusMeta

declarations.default: avatarMeta

declarations.default: { render: () => html` <ai-conversation live label="Streaming transcript"> <ai-message role="assistant" status="running"> <ai-thinking content="Need to preserve current live thinking disclosure behavior." open></ai-thinking> <ai-tool-call id="streaming-bash" name="bash" headline="bun run check" status="running" open> <ai-tool-result for="streaming-bash" name="bash" channel="stdout" content="Checking…"></ai-tool-result> </ai-tool-call> <ai-markdown content="I’m checking the refactor now…"></ai-markdown> </ai-message> </ai-conversation> `, }

members.name: src
members.description: Image source URL. When set, renders an .

members.name: name
members.description: Display name. Used for initials fallback and img alt text.

type.text: { bg: string; text: string; border: string }

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Image source URL. When set, renders an .

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Display name. Used for initials fallback and img alt text.

members.name: dot
members.description: Whether to show a leading dot indicator.

type.text: { bg: string; text: string; border: string }

attributes.name: dot
attributes.description: Whether to show a leading dot indicator.

declarations.description: Markdown content renderer. Parses and renders markdown source.
declarations.name: AiMarkdown

slots.description: Fallback content if content property is empty.

members.name: content
members.description: Markdown content to render. Does NOT reflect (large content).

members.name: tone
members.description: Visual tone for prose style parity with pi-ui messages.

members.name: trusted
members.description: Whether the content is trusted (affects link behavior).

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Markdown content to render. Does NOT reflect (large content).

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description: Visual tone for prose style parity with pi-ui messages.

attributes.name: trusted
attributes.description: Whether the content is trusted (affects link behavior).

members.name: inline
members.description: Whether to use inline-flex instead of flex.

attributes.name: inline
attributes.description: Whether to use inline-flex instead of flex.

cssProperties.description: Focus ring for slotted/native focus styling.
cssProperties.name: --focus-ring

type.text: { bg: string; text: string; border: string }
